description_long: This is a dark, check-patterned deerstalker hat, commonly associated with detective attire, particularly Sherlock Holmes. The hat features a rounded, domed crown with a prominent button on top and a short, slightly curved brim at the front. The fabric appears to be a soft, matte wool or tweed, giving it a subtle texture and muted sheen. The hat's band is made from a slightly different, smoother material, encircling the base of the crown. The overall construction is soft and flexible, designed to fit snugly on the head. There are no visible decorative elements or branding on the exterior.
description: A dark, check-patterned deerstalker hat with a domed crown, top button, and short curved brim, made from soft wool or tweed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the short, curved brim and the rounded crown with a central button.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hat's domed profile and the prominence of the top button.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the crown and the continuous band around the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hat's curved brim and domed crown.
attribute_crown_shape: rounded and domed with a central button
